abilities.description: Gain control of target noncreature spell. You may choose new targets for it. (If that spell is an artifact, enchantment, or planeswalker, the permanent you control enters.)

effect.description: Gain control of target noncreature spell. You may choose new targets for it. (If that spell is an artifact, enchantment, or planeswalker, the permanent you control enters.)
effect.name: ControlSpell

statics.description: You may exile two blue cards from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
